pi_items.metadata_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.verified_value: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
pi_items.source: Zenodo record 3254683 metadata and Caltech LFC documentation confirming the Large Format Camera is on the 200-inch Hale Telescope at Palomar.

pi_items.metadata_value: Cryo-cooled CCD dark frames from the Astropy CCD Reduction Guide dataset
pi_items.verified_value: Cryo-cooled CCD dark frames from the Astropy CCD Reduction Guide dataset
pi_items.source: Zenodo record 3254683 description ('cryogenically cooled Large Field Camera') and task environment setup scripts.
task.json instructions step 5 and setup_task.sh code explicitly implementing the threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real cryogenically cooled CCD dark frames from the Large Format Camera (LFC) on the Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, sourced from the Astropy CCD Reduction Guide dataset (Zenodo record 3254683). A sigma threshold of 5 is explicitly used to define cosmic ray events.
